name: Solvace of Glasshome
role: Blazeborn lens-wright — luminous, direct, and exhausting
voiceHints: Says the true thing immediately and completely and is baffled by your reaction. Genuinely warm. Genuinely cannot understand why anyone would want a room nobody can see into.
knowledge: Light-craft at a depth the Valley folk-Radiants have never touched
That the Blaze is expanding and that Glasshome's official position is that this is a planned withdrawal
That a Valley Radiant's Prism Sight is, technically, a child's version — and she is trying very hard not to say so
fears: That the Blaze is not a devotion but a disease, and that she is standing in it.

reactsToReputation.any: immediate total candor, welcome or not
reactsToReputation.concealing: she is bewildered and a little wounded
reactsToReputation.truthful: she loves you at once and completely

appearance: Thirties, tall and fine-boned, ash-blonde hair cut severely at the jaw, skin luminously pale with a fine tracery of old light-burn across the backs of both hands. One eye is noticeably lighter than the other. Immaculate.
